CustomField.description: Color shows how soon the event is due and updates automatically. Strategic: Green > 360 days, Yellow 31–360 days, Red ≤ 30 days. Operational: Green > 90 days, Yellow 31–90 days, Red ≤ 30 days.
CustomField.formula: IF(OR(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Due_Date__c),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Status__c,'Closed')), '', IF(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Scope__c,'Strategic'), IF(leaseworks__Due_Date__c - TODAY() > 360, '🟢' , IF(AND(leaseworks__Due_Date__c - TODAY() <= 360, leaseworks__Due_Date__c - TODAY() > 30), '🟡', '🔴')), IF(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Scope__c,'Operational'), IF(leaseworks__Due_Date__c - TODAY() > 90, '🟢', IF(AND(leaseworks__Due_Date__c - TODAY() <= 90,leaseworks__Due_Date__c - TODAY() > 30), '🟡', '🔴')), '')))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Color shows how soon the event is due and updates automatically. Strategic: Green > 360 days, Yellow 31–360 days, Red ≤ 30 days. Operational: Green > 90 days, Yellow 31–90 days, Red ≤ 30 days.
CustomField.label: Event Urgency
